training_status: heavy weight training, incline walking, HIIT

benefits.description: Recommended as part of cutting protocol with incline walking and HIIT

protocol_notes: Recommendation only: MOTS-c 5mg 3x weekly before workouts as part of cutting protocol. Also mentions considering HGH, GHS peptides, and TRT if bloodwork supports. Recommends maintaining heavy lifting, 200g+ protein daily, calorie deficit with high-fiber carbs.
